Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Documents Filed In Support Of Demurrer
Off Calendar Aug-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Seal Documents Filed In Support Of Demurrer.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's unopposed motion to seal documents filed in support of the City's demurrer (Exhibits A and B to the City's request for judicial notice) is granted. The motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to the first amended complaint ("FAC") is off calendar as moot as to the first cause of action against Zuckerberg San Francisco General Hospital ("ZSFGH") and overruled as to the second cause of action against the San Francisco Fire Department ("SFFD"). (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
